body:
Regulation: B.C. Reg. 51/2026
Made under: Financial Information Act
Published in: No. 6 – B.C. Regs. 43 to 56, April 7, 2026
Deposit date: April 7, 2026

B.C. Reg. 51/2026, deposited April 7, 2026, under theFINANCIAL INFORMATION ACT[section 5],LOBBYISTS TRANSPARENCY ACT[section 11],MEDICARE PROTECTION ACT[section 51] andPUBLIC INTEREST DISCLOSURE ACT[section 48]. Order in Council 128/2026, approved and ordered April 7, 2026. On the recommendation of the undersigned, the Administrator, by and with the advice and consent of the Executive Council, orders the following: (a)	Schedule 2 to theFinancial Information Act, R.S.B.C. 1996, c. 140, is amended as set out in the attached Appendix 1; (b)	the Government Body Designation (Public Interest Disclosure) Regulation, B.C. Reg. 58/2022, is amended as set out in the attached Appendix 2; (c)	the Lobbyists Transparency Regulation, B.C. Reg. 235/2019, is amended as set out in the attached Appendix 3; (d)	the Medical and Health Care Services Regulation, B.C. Reg. 426/97, is amended as set out in the attached Appendix 4. — J. OSBORNE,Minister of Health; R. PARMAR,Presiding Member of the Executive Council. 1	Schedule 2 to the Financial Information Act, R.S.B.C. 1996, c. 140, is amended by adding the following: 1	The Schedule to the Government Body Designation (Public Interest Disclosure) Regulation, B.C. Reg. 58/2022, is amended by adding the following item as indicated: 1	The Appendix to the Lobbyists Transparency Regulation, B.C. Reg. 235/2019, is amended by adding the following item as indicated: 1	Section 29.2 (d) of the Medical and Health Care Services Regulation, B.C. Reg. 426/97, is amended by striking out "or" at the end of subparagraph (iv), by adding ", or" at the end of subparagraph (v) and by adding the following subparagraph: (vi)	BC Shared Health Services. Index Page|Previous Regulation|Next Regulation|Cumulative Index Page Copyright © 2026: King's Printer, Victoria, British Columbia, Canada

minutes_briefs.title: BC Shared Health Services added to multiple provincial regulations
minutes_briefs.summary: BC Shared Health Services has been added to several provincial regulations under the Financial Information Act, Lobbyists Transparency Act, Medicare Protection Act, and Public Interest Disclosure Act. This means the organization is now officially recognized as a government body for financial reporting, lobbying rules, health service oversight, and whistleblower protections.
